text: Where is the restroom?
How much is this?
Can I see the menu, please?
I'd like to check in, please.
Do you speak English?
Could you help me, please?
Where can I buy a ticket?
Is this seat taken?
Can I pay by card?
The check, please.
Can I have a receipt?
Where is the bus stop?
I am just looking, thanks.
Could you speak slowly?
One more, please.
Is breakfast included?
Can I try this on?
Keep the change, please.
Where is the exit?
I would like some water.
Could you tell me how to get to the station?
I have a reservation under the name of Kim.
Is there a pharmacy near here? I have a headache.
What time does the museum open tomorrow morning?
ko: 박물관은 내일 아침 몇 시에 여나요?

text: Could you take a picture of us in front of the gate?
ko: 정문 앞에서 저희 사진 좀 찍어주시겠어요?

text: I would like to order the same thing as that table.
ko: 저 테이블과 같은 걸로 주문하고 싶어요.

text: How long does it take to get to the airport?
Can you recommend a good restaurant near the hotel?
ko: 호텔 근처에 괜찮은 식당을 추천해 주시겠어요?

text: Excuse me, I think this is the wrong order.
ko: 실례합니다, 주문이 잘못 나온 것 같아요.

text: Where should I transfer if I want to get downtown?
Could I have the bill separately, please?
Do you have this same item in a smaller size?
How far is the city center from the airport?
I would like to book a table for two tonight.
ko: 오늘 밤 두 명 자리를 예약하고 싶어요.

text: Is there free wireless internet in the lobby?
Could you call a taxi for me to the airport, please?
ko: 공항까지 가는 택시 좀 불러 주시겠어요?

text: What is the best way to get to the old town?
ko: 구시가지로 가는 가장 좋은 방법이 뭔가요?

text: Could you please write down the address here for me?
Excuse me, I think there is a mistake on this bill.
ko: 실례지만, 이 계산서에 착오가 있는 것 같아요.

text: What time should we check out of the room?
Excuse me, I think I left my bag on the bus. Where should I go to report a lost item?
ko: 실례합니다, 버스에 가방을 두고 내린 것 같아요. 분실물은 어디에 신고해야 하나요?

text: Could you recommend a good local restaurant nearby? We would like to try some traditional food.
ko: 근처에 괜찮은 현지 식당을 추천해 주시겠어요? 전통 음식을 먹어보고 싶어요.

text: I would like to change my reservation to a later date. Is there an extra charge for that?
ko: 예약을 더 늦은 날짜로 변경하고 싶어요. 추가 요금이 있나요?

text: My room is too noisy and the air conditioner does not work. Could I move to another room?
ko: 방이 너무 시끄럽고 에어컨이 작동하지 않아요. 다른 방으로 옮길 수 있을까요?

text: I am allergic to peanuts. Could you tell me if this dish contains any nuts at all?
ko: 저는 땅콩 알레르기가 있어요. 이 요리에 견과류가 조금이라도 들어 있는지 알려주시겠어요?

text: Is there a bus that goes to the beach from here? And how often does it run on weekends?
ko: 여기서 해변으로 가는 버스가 있나요? 주말에는 얼마나 자주 다니나요?

text: I missed my connecting flight because of the delay. Could you help me find another one?
ko: 지연 때문에 연결 항공편을 놓쳤어요. 다른 항공편을 찾는 것 좀 도와주시겠어요?

text: This is my first time visiting this city. What places would you recommend for one day?
ko: 이 도시는 처음 방문이에요. 하루 동안 가 볼 만한 곳을 추천해 주시겠어요?

text: Could I get a refund for this? It was broken when I opened the box at the hotel.
ko: 이거 환불받을 수 있을까요? 호텔에서 상자를 열어 보니 깨져 있었어요.

text: The taxi meter seems to be running too fast. Could you stop here? I will walk the rest.
ko: 택시 미터기가 너무 빨리 올라가는 것 같아요. 여기서 세워 주시겠어요? 나머지는 걸어갈게요.

text: I would like to exchange some money. Where is the nearest exchange counter from here?
ko: 환전을 좀 하고 싶어요. 여기서 가장 가까운 환전소가 어디인가요?

text: We are looking for a quiet place to sit and rest. Is there a park somewhere nearby?
ko: 앉아서 쉴 조용한 곳을 찾고 있어요. 근처에 공원이 있나요?

text: My phone battery is almost dead. Do you happen to have a charger that I could borrow?
ko: 휴대폰 배터리가 거의 다 됐어요. 혹시 빌릴 수 있는 충전기가 있나요?

text: Could you tell me which platform the train to the coast leaves from this afternoon?
ko: 오늘 오후 해안으로 가는 기차가 몇 번 승강장에서 출발하는지 알려주시겠어요?

text: We have only a few hours before our flight. What is the closest place worth visiting?
ko: 비행기 시간까지 몇 시간밖에 없어요. 가장 가까운 가 볼 만한 곳이 어디인가요?

text: I booked a room with a sea view, but this one faces the parking lot. Could you check it?
ko: 바다 전망 방을 예약했는데 이 방은 주차장이 보여요. 확인해 주시겠어요?

text: Is it possible to store our luggage here until the evening? We check out at noon today.
ko: 저녁까지 짐을 여기 맡길 수 있을까요? 오늘 정오에 체크아웃해요.

text: The ticket machine is not accepting my card. Could you show me how to buy a ticket here?
ko: 발권기가 제 카드를 받지 않아요. 여기서 표 사는 법을 보여주시겠어요?

text: We would love to see the sunset tonight. Which spot in the city has the best view of it?
ko: 오늘 밤 일몰을 꼭 보고 싶어요. 도시에서 일몰이 가장 잘 보이는 곳은 어디인가요?

text: Excuse me, could you let me know when we reach the central market? I am not familiar here.
ko: 실례지만 중앙 시장에 도착하면 알려주시겠어요? 여기가 익숙하지 않아서요.
